entities.name: N5 OS
entities.context: V's operating system containing research functions, meeting processing, and knowledge management capabilities

entities.name: Strategic Partner
entities.context: Core cognitive engine of N5 OS; primary interface between V's thinking and the entire system

entities.name: voice memos
entities.context: Input mechanism for V's raw thinking that feeds into the Strategic Partner

entities.name: externalized cognitive architecture
entities.context: Framework for strategic thinking that the system embodies

entities.name: adaptive cognitive architecture
entities.context: Provides right type of thinking support at the right time with appropriate challenge level and output format

entities.name: strategic thinking
entities.context: The refined output produced from raw thinking through the system

entities.name: hypotheses
entities.context: Updated as part of the cognitive flow from voice memos to realizations

relationships.context: Core cognitive engine that orchestrates all other N5 capabilities
Voice memos feed into strategic dialogue as input
Transforms raw thinking into refined strategy
Provides right type of thinking support at right time
System embodies externalized cognitive architecture for strategic thinking
Strategic dialogue leads to hypothesis updates
